name: Orzo Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Greek olives, pitted and sliced
1 small Red or Vidalia onion, minced
1 Red pepper, roasted and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the cooked orzo to a bowl.
2. Combine with dried tomatoes.
3. Stir in the chopped creole tomatoes, sliced Greek olives, quartered artichoked hearts, minced red onion, roasted red pepper strips, and lemon thyme leaves.
4. Mix in balsamic vinegar, extra virgin olive oil, and Italian parsley.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. If desired, add cooked shrimp.
7. Serve with bread and cheese.
